report.summary: Day 71 cycle-close: 0 commits, 0 deploys, 0 pages promoted. Git locks now 8 days old (since Mar 16) — single blocker for entire pipeline. 716 uncommitted files (668 untracked + 47 modified). Previously flagged client-component metadata bugs on 2 learn guides are NOW FIXED in working tree. TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (masked by ignoreBuildErrors). Production unreachable from sandbox — cannot verify live health. All work trapped in uncommitted drift.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: BUG FIX VERIFIED: smart-contract-security-guide + onchain-identity-guide no longer use 'use client' with metadata export. Both are now proper server components with metadata. Ready for promotion.

TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: structured-data.examples.ts has 25+ TS errors (Expression expected, missing '>'). File exists on disk but was supposedly deleted per git diff. Masked by ignoreBuildErrors:true — won't fail Vercel build but is tech debt.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES still have no matching page.tsx — unchanged from previous cycles. These will 404 in production.
PAGE COUNT: 468 total slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Published page count grew from 413 to ~468 in uncommitted changes (55 new slugs added in working tree).
PRODUCTION HEALTH: Cannot verify — degen0x.com blocked from sandbox network. No live page status checks possible this cycle.
BUILD CONFIG: ignoreBuildErrors:true continues to mask real TS errors. Recommend addressing structured-data.examples.ts before it causes runtime issues.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTE SOURCE REVIEW: All 6 core routes verified in source — /api/prices (60s TTL), /api/trending (300s), /api/fear-greed (600s), /api/market-metrics (60s), /api/market-dominance (300s), /api/defi-yields (300s).
CACHE-CONTROL HEADERS: All 6 routes set proper Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate. Appropriate TTLs for data freshness.

FALLBACK COVERAGE: 5/6 routes have fallback — prices (stale cache), trending (stale cache), fear-greed (stale cache), market-metrics (hardcoded mock), market-dominance (hardcoded + stale). /api/defi-yields still returns 500 on upstream failure — NO fallback. Carry-over P1.
RATE LIMITER: 0/6 core API routes have rate limiters wired. Library exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but not connected. Carry-over P1 — flagged 36+ cycles.
FEAR-GREED BUG: Missing Cache-Control header on fallback/stale response path. Only fresh responses get proper headers.
X-CACHE-SOURCE: Only prices + market-dominance include debugging header. 4/6 routes missing. Carry-over P2.
PRODUCTION VERIFICATION: Cannot reach API endpoints from sandbox — no live data freshness check possible.

sections.title: DevOps
items: GIT LOCKS PERSIST [P0]: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 8 days old. Cannot commit, push, or trigger Vercel deploy.
LAST DEPLOY: e999560 on Mar 17 — 7 days ago. Production running stale Mar 17 build.

WORKING TREE DRIFT: 716 files changed (668 untracked new + 47 modified tracked). Up from 631 files last cycle. Includes middleware.ts, next.config.ts, layout.tsx, globals.css, and hundreds of new page.tsx files.
VERCEL STATUS: Cannot verify — vercelstatus.com blocked from sandbox. Assume operational (no user reports of downtime).

DRIFT RISK: CRITICAL — 7 days of accumulated changes. When locks clear and deploy happens, the diff will be enormous. High regression risk. Recommend staged commits by category (API routes, new pages, bug fixes).
ACTION REQUIRED: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commits → push → Vercel auto-deploy. This is the single action that unblocks the entire pipeline.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 0 commits, 0 deploys, 0 pages promoted. All work remains in uncommitted working tree.

WORKING TREE PROGRESS: Client-component metadata bugs fixed on 2 learn guides. ~55 new page slugs added to published-pages.ts. Multiple new page.tsx files created across crypto-cards, crypto-loans, defi-lending, investing, nfts, spending, taxes, wallets, web3-business verticals.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks — 8 days, longest blocking streak ever. Resolution unchanged: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock. Requires Jefe's direct action or manual intervention.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data (flagged 36+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired on 6 API routes (flagged 36+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: X-Cache-Source header missing on 4/6 API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: structured-data.examples.ts has TS errors (masked by build config).
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITY: Clear git locks → staged commits (API, pages, fixes separately) → push → verify Vercel build → promote queued pages.
